$description: Structured Liquidity design tokens. W3C Design Tokens Community Group format. Each token carries its CSS custom-property name in $extensions.cssVar so an agent can apply it directly to :root.

accent.$description: The single semantic accent. Use exactly one accent for emphasis.

accentInk.$description: Readable ink for text/icons sitting on the accent fill. Flip to white when the accent is dark (luminance-derived).

edge.$description: Border color. Black in both modes. The CSS token --edge holds rgb channels ('0 0 0') for use as rgb(var(--edge)).

hardShadow.$description: Color of the flat offset shadow.

negative.$description: Destructive / negative surface. Neutral gray, never red.

blur.$description: backdrop-filter blur radius for liquid glass surfaces.

tint.$description: Glass fill tint. The CSS token --glass-tint holds rgb channels ('255 255 255') for rgba(var(--glass-tint), var(--glass-alpha)).

alpha.$description: Glass fill opacity (dark mode). Light mode raises this to 0.55.

width.$description: Load-bearing border weight. Solid, never decorative.

base.$description: Corner radius. Square by default; raise deliberately.

flat.$description: The flat offset shadow. Blur is always 0, structural, never soft. Offset is driven by --hard-x / --hard-y.

display.$description: Headings, buttons, brand. Heavy and tight. Controlled live by the page tweaker.

body.$description: Paragraph / reading copy. Humanist and legible.

mono.$description: Labels, captions, data, eyebrows. Never long paragraphs.

light.$description: Overrides applied when <html data-mode="light">. Apply these values on top of the defaults above.
